jobs.title: Chief Risk Officer
jobs.content: <p><strong>Chief Risk Officer (CRO)</strong></p><p><strong>Organization: Sezzle Bank ILC</strong></p><p>Sezzle is the BNPL platform pioneered around the four-instalment-over-six-weeks consumer-credit data model & the deferred-payments segment.</p>

jobs.title: AI Engineer I (Remote)
jobs.content: <p>Sezzle's AI Engineering team builds the four-instalment-over-six-weeks BNPL credit-decisioning pipeline.</p>
